reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 (Dead Code): PASS - new_for_block_publishing is called from build_data_columns at publish_blocks.rs:423 in active block publishing path. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): PASS - Issue involves semi-trusted Engine API data, but spec requires gossip validation regardless of source; defense-in-depth gap, not trust boundary violation. Gate 3 (Code Verification): PASS - Phase 03 reading is accurate: main gossip path has verify_slot_higher_than_parent at data_column_verification.rs:504, while new_for_block_publishing only calls verify_data_column_sidecar (structural) and verify_is_unknown_sidecar (dedup) without slot validation. Gate 4 (Exploitability): PASS - Code-intrinsic (requires bug in local EL or block construction), but qualifies as protocol violation. However, practical impact is limited: other nodes reject invalid columns at gossip validation, so only the publishing node suffers (self-inflicted peer penalties, minimal bandwidth waste). Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): PASS - 01e property PROP-6a4369e9-pre-005 from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:317-332 requires 'Gossip validation must reject sidecar whose slot is not higher than parent block slot' (assertion: forall sidecar: accepted(sidecar) => sidecar.slot > parent_block.slot). Code creates GossipVerifiedDataColumn without enforcing this requirement. Gate 6 (Scope): PASS - Fusaka-specific PeerDAS validation, in-scope. Severity Adjustment: Original HIGH downgraded to Low. Reason: (1) Requires implementation bug in semi-trusted local EL, not direct attacker trigger. (2) Impact limited to publishing node (self-harm); network protected by peer gossip validation. (3) Lighthouse market share caps max network impact per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE deployment_context. This is a defense-in-depth gap and spec compliance issue rather than a critical network vulnerability. An implementation bug in local block construction could cause a node to publish invalid data columns, triggering self-inflicted peer penalties and minimal bandwidth waste, but the network's gossip validation prevents broader propagation.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Gossip validation must reject sidecar whose slot is not higher than parent block slot. (assertion: forall sidecar: accepted(sidecar) => sidecar.slot > parent_block.slot) [01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:317-332]
